title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS video outlines five production best practices for deploying TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The patterns apply across platforms despite AWS-specific tooling examples.
